Source Transparency

Stories come from hand-picked publishers — no algorithmic ranking, no promoted content.

View all 19 sources Editorial policy →

A cleaner way to
follow gaming.

Built for players, not advertisers. GameBeeper is open, transparent and completely free.

No Ads

Zero advertising, zero trackers, zero monetisation that compromises your reading experience.

No Paywalls

Every story, every category and every feature is completely free — always.

Trusted Sources

19 hand-picked publishers — official platform blogs, leading independents and industry reporters.

Curated, Not Algorithmic

Stories sorted chronologically — no engagement manipulation, no filter bubbles.

Open Source

The full codebase is public on GitHub. Inspect it, fork it, contribute to it.

Privacy First

Analytics only run with your consent. No persistent tracking, no data selling.

Your feedback shapes this

Something broken?
Tell us.

Found a broken feed? Know a gaming source worth adding? Have a UI suggestion? GitHub Issues is the fastest path to a fix — every report gets read.

  • Report a broken or dead RSS feed
  • Suggest a quality gaming source worth adding
  • Share a UI or performance improvement idea
  • Just say hi — every message is appreciated
Open an Issue on GitHub
About this project

Behind
GameBeeper.

GameBeeper is an open-source video game news aggregator. It collects RSS feeds from 19 trusted gaming sources — official platform publishers, independent outlets, and industry reporters — into one fast, clean, distraction-free feed. No ads, no paywalls, no tracking without consent.

  • Open source — view on GitHub
  • Editorial policy: Feed selection criteria

Launched 2026 — Open source — No ads — No paywalls

Privacy Policy Terms of Use
Feed sources
  • Latest: VGC, Gematsu, Eurogamer, IGN, GameSpot, Destructoid, Polygon, Kotaku, TheGamer
  • PlayStation: PlayStation Blog Official, Push Square
  • Xbox: Xbox Wire Official, Pure Xbox
  • Nintendo: Nintendo Life, Nintendo Everything
  • PC Gaming: PC Gamer, Rock Paper Shotgun, PCGamesN
  • Industry: GamesIndustry.biz
GameBeeper

GameBeeper brings trusted gaming stories together in one player-first signal. Independent. Open source. No ads. No paywalls.
